testcase.name: test_non_cohort_user_denied
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration5_p1_features.py:100: in test_non_cohort_user_denied assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_profile_update_peer_availability
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration5_p1_features.py:257: in test_profile_update_peer_availability assert response.status_code == 200, f"Profile update failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Profile update failed: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","peer_availability",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"day":"Monday","slots":[{"from":"09:00","to":"17:00"}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"},{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","peer_availability",1],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"day":"Tuesday","slots":[{"from":"10:00","to":"18:00"}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
